title: pleopeltis × bartlettii
intro: Pleopeltis × bartlettii, a rare and unique plant species, is a hybrid of the Pleopeltis polypodioides and Pleopeltis cordylophora, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its remarkable ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis × bartlettii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
